sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Track blue bar position through history
print("Blue bar position history:")
for i, h in enumerate(history):
    seg = h.frame.segmentation
    for n in seg['nodes']:
        if n['color'] == 'b':
            b = n['boundary']
            rows = [p[0] for p in b]
            cols = [p[1] for p in b]
            print(f"  Step {h.frame.step} (action={h.action}): rows {min(rows)}-{max(rows)}, cols {min(cols)}-{max(cols)}")
            break
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
